title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 03 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 03 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 03 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/11/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures weakened significantly, with the main contract I2601 eventually closing at 782.5 yuan,down 1.82% from the previous working day. The mainstream spot price at ports fell by 12-14 yuan/ton from the previous working day. The transaction price of PB powder in Shandong area was 786-788 yuan/ton, down 12-14 yuan/ton from the previous day; the transaction price of PB powder in Hebei area This week, iron ore shipments increased slightly by 1.5%, and the number of arrivals increased significantly by more than 13.8%.
